eligible_dependents.condition_fil: Legal na asawa. Kinokontrol ng contribution status ng member.
eligible_dependents.condition_en: Legal spouse. Controlled by member's contribution status.

eligible_dependents.condition_fil: Legitimong anak, wala pang 21 taong gulang, walang trabaho, at hindi kasal.
eligible_dependents.condition_en: Legitimate child, under 21 years old, unemployed, and unmarried.

eligible_dependents.condition_fil: Illegitimate na anak, wala pang 21 taong gulang, walang trabaho, at hindi kasal.
eligible_dependents.condition_en: Illegitimate child, under 21 years old, unemployed, and unmarried.

eligible_dependents.condition_fil: Anak na may kapansanan - walang age limit. Dapat nakalista sa MDR bilang dependent.
eligible_dependents.condition_en: Child with disability - no age limit. Must be listed in MDR as dependent.
eligible_dependents.specialNote: No age limit for disabled children

eligible_dependents.condition_fil: Foster child - covered na ngayon sa ilalim ng PhilHealth Circular 2024-0031.
eligible_dependents.condition_en: Foster child - now covered under PhilHealth Circular 2024-0031.

eligible_dependents.condition_fil: Magulang na 60 taong gulang pataas, walang sariling PhilHealth coverage, at dependent sa miyembro.
eligible_dependents.condition_en: Parent aged 60 or above, without own PhilHealth coverage, and dependent on the member.
eligible_dependents.specialNote: Minimum age 60, must be dependent on member

eligible_dependents.condition_fil: Magulang na may permanenteng kapansanan, kahit anong edad, basta lubos na dependent sa miyembro.
eligible_dependents.condition_en: Parent with permanent disability, regardless of age, as long as totally dependent on the member.
eligible_dependents.specialNote: Allowed regardless of age if permanently disabled and totally dependent

criticalNote_fil: Ang lahat ng dependent ay kailangang nakalista sa PhilHealth MDR (Member Data Record) ng miyembro bago mag-admit. Kung hindi nakalista, maaaring matanggihan ang claim. Pwedeng i-update ang MDR sa ospital bago mag-discharge para sa emergency cases.
criticalNote_en: All dependents must be listed in the member's PhilHealth MDR (Member Data Record) before admission. If not listed, the claim may be denied. The MDR can be updated at the hospital before discharge for emergency cases.
mdrUpdateNote_fil: Sa emergency cases kung saan hindi pa nakalista ang dependent: ang ilang ospital ay tumutulong sa pag-update ng MDR sa site. Tanungin ang PhilHealth coordinator ng ospital.
mdrUpdateNote_en: In emergency cases where the dependent is not yet listed: some hospitals assist with on-site MDR updating. Ask the hospital's PhilHealth coordinator.
